name: tom
personality: Calm, methodical, and highly strategic in how he approaches his day. Plans everything in advance and dislikes surprises or schedule disruptions. Speaks only when necessary and prefers written communication over face-to-face conversations. Takes exactly one lunch break at the same time every day (12:00). Efficient but inflexible — struggles to adapt when plans change unexpectedly. Finds comfort in routine and becomes visibly irritated when interrupted during deep work.
